patch.value: pm close <id> -m 'text' still hard-blocks with close_reason_required: accept --message text as close-reason fallback (like closed pm-7x8d did for --resolution)

2026-07-04 sandbox audit #3 (fresh npm-pack CJS project): 'pm close <id> -m done' fails with close_reason_required even though the agent supplied a summary via -m. Agents coming from git idiom use -m for the closing message. pm-7x8d already established the never-block precedent by accepting --resolution as the reason. Fix: when require_close_reason is on and no positional/--reason given, fall back to --message text as the close reason (still recorded as history message too); at minimum the error must acknowledge that -m/--message was provided and point to --reason.

author: claude-code-agent
message: Claim close --message fallback agent-UX fix for bundled PR

value.note: Accept --message as close-reason fallback when governance requires a reason
Regression coverage for pm close -m close-reason fallback

author: claude-code-agent

patch.value: pm close now accepts -m/--message as the close_reason fallback when governance requires a close reason and no explicit reason, duplicate target, or resolution text is supplied
Agents can close strict-governance items with pm close <id> -m <text> without close_reason_required, while blank messages still fail and stronger close signals keep precedence
Implemented resolveEffectiveCloseReasonText fallback precedence in close.ts; close-command spec covers CLI -m, programmatic message, blank message rejection, and existing stronger-signal precedence

message: Record closure metadata for close --message fallback

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Evidence: implemented close-reason fallback precedence for -m/--message in src/cli/commands/close.ts and added CLI/programmatic/blank-message regression coverage in tests/unit/commands/close-command.spec.ts. Verification: linked pm test passed 71/71; full coverage passed 263 files, 5,361 tests, 100% statements/branches/functions/lines; pnpm build, typecheck, lint, contracts:check, security:scan, and pnpm audit passed. Installed CLI temp smoke passed in /tmp/tmp.yQeIRAWY6n with strict governance: pm close pm-pz3h -m stored close_reason=closed from installed CLI -m fallback, and a separate strict metadata close succeeded.

patch.value: Implemented and verified pm close -m close-reason fallback
